title: Multi-Agent Engine Integration: spawnSubagent orchestration assembly

AC1.note: spawnSubagent (orchestrate.ts) composes spawnChild(caps+budget+policy+model)+childRunModel; returns {extension,runModel,provenance,reservation} or fail-closed denial; assembly tests inherit/explicit/tier

AC2.note: allowedProvidersFromDetected derives allowlist from injected detection; non-detected provider denied (not in allowlist); network provider admissible only when detected+policy allows; no ambient env read in facade

AC3.note: single RemainingBudgetLedger threaded via ctx; 5 sequential calls granted=2 (budget-bound), childCount/remaining correct; maxChildren cap denies 3rd

AC4.note: config.subagents mapped to spawnChild caps/tiers/envOverride; omitted config => DEFAULT_MAX_TREE_DEPTH/CHILDREN; default depth cap denies too-deep child

AC5.note: foldChildSummary runs quarantineChildSummary; clean passes, instruction-shaped flagged with marker + original preserved

AC6.note: facade pure (injected detection+ledger+idSeq/clock, no Date.now/Math.random); orchestrate.test.ts 12 tests; full suite 1638 pass/0 fail incl dep guard; tsc clean

tasks.title: Add/adjust tests and make them pass
